# Visit Colombia 🇨🇴

> A modern tourism website for Colombia, built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, featuring an AI Travel Expert with a specialized geographical knowledge base.

## Project Structure

- [README.md](README.md): Overview and setup instructions.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Mission, core capabilities, and skills for AI agents.
- [app](app/): Next.js App Router root (pages, layouts, and logic).
- [components](components/): Reusable UI components (Navbar, Hero, ChatWidget).
- [lib](lib/): Utility functions and API clients.
- [scripts](scripts/): Tools for data processing and knowledge base generation.
- [data](data/): Geographic data mappings and backups.

## Key Resources for LLMs

- [colombia_master.json](colombia_master.json): Factual "Ground Truth" database for the AI Assistant.
- [app.py](app.py): Core logic for the Hugging Face AI Assistant (Python/Gradio).
- [skills/](skills/): Detailed documentation of project-specific AI capabilities.

## Technical Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **AI Backend**: Python (Gradio) + Hugging Face Spaces
- **Data Source**: API Colombia
